message:
feat(config): add ZFS images and VMs paths

Add ImagesPath and VMsPath fields to ZFSConfig struct to specify
where base images and per-VM datasets are stored:
- ImagesPath: stockyard/images (for rootfs base image with @base snapshot)
- VMsPath: stockyard/vms (for per-VM clone datasets)
